text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to computer systems designed to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. The most common type of AI today is narrow AI, which can do specific jobs like recognising faces or translating languages. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data instead of being programmed with exact rules. Deep learning, a more advanced form of machine learning, uses complex layers of algorithms to process information, similar to how our brains work. You probably use AI every day—for example, when your phone suggests the next word you want to type, or when Netflix recommends a show you might like.
